effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, if there are no other rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn, and at the end of that battle, [Stand] this unit. (Including your opponent's rear-guards)
flavorTextEN: This is what it means to unleash our spirits completely.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your vanguard is "Apex-surpassing Sword, Bastion Prime", this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit [Stand] by your card effect, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Dedicating my life and sword to you, my master.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit is [Stand] by your vanguard's ability, choose one of your other rear-guards, and that unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: A warriors soul shines from the thundering roar and sword strikes on a battlefield.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your grade 2 or greater units being attacked, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle. If you chose a grade 4, it gets +20000 instead of +10000.
flavorTextEN: Embrace hope, and demolish despair. A compassionate shield will spread its wings.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit [Stand] by your card's ability, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):If your soul has a "Phantom Blaster Dragon", this unit gets [Critical]+1.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [retire two of your rear-guards], choose a "Blaster Dark" from your soul or drop, call it to (RC), and if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, that called unit and this unit get [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN:
When the many despairs of the people have gathered,
the hell dragon reveals its true form.

nameEN: One Who Walks the Path of Light, Thegrea
effectEN:
[CONT]:The normal ride from hand of a unit with "Thegrea" in its different card name from this unit on this unit also becomes a Persona Ride.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one grade 2 or less unit card from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck. If "One Who Blooms in the Dark, Thegrea" is in your soul, choose up to two instead of one.
[AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle that this unit attacked, if this unit was placed by riding from "One Who Blooms in the Dark, Thegrea" this turn, COST  [discard a card from your hand], choose one of your rear-guards, and [Stand] it.
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: With the light of hope, I will create an unwavering future.

nameEN: One Who Blooms in the Dark, Thegrea
effectEN:
[CONT]:The normal ride from hand of a unit with "Thegrea" in its different card name from this unit on this unit also becomes a Persona Ride.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Retire two of your grade 2 or less rear-guards], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it. If "One Who Walks the Path of Light, Thegrea" is in your soul, retire all of your opponent's rear-guards in the same column as the chosen unit.
[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :At the end of the battle that this unit attacked, if this unit was placed by riding from "One Who Walks the Path of Light, Thegrea" this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Discard a card from your hand], [Stand] this unit, and it gets drive -1 until end of turn.
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: The dark despair will perfect my revenge.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):If your soul has a "Blaster Blade" and a "Blaster Dark", this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Critical]+1. (Active on opponent's turn too)
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, perform all of the following. (You can choose to perform only one)
• COST  [Put a "Blaster Blade" from your (RC) into your soul], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
• COST  [Put a "Blaster Dark" from your (RC) into your soul], and this unit gets drive +1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Enveloped in light and shadow, the legendary knight manifests.

nameEN: Bravery To Stand Against, Will to Pierce Through
effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter-Blast 1] if you have a vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name!
Search your deck for up to one grade 2 unit card with "Blaster" in its card name, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: A shadow endowed in courage and resolution slashes the sorrowful fate.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your Order Zone has a Set Order, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle, and if it has three or more Set Orders, this unit gets [Power]+10000 instead of +5000.
[Glitter]-"Eva" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Eva" in its card name)
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by a card's ability, if your Order Zone has three or more Research cards, this unit gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn.
[CONT](RC/GC):This unit gets "Intercept", and [Shield]+10000.
flavorTextEN: This strike will cut through your regrets

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have a vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The physical strength of a giant can literally shatter problematic issues.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (2)], look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one unit card from among them, call it to (RC), and put the rest on the top of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: The goddess of victory shines on those who are one step ahead.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & reveal a normal unit from your hand, and put it on the bottom of your deck], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Isn't the fun still enough?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your other grade 3 or greater units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If a grade 3 card was revealed for your drive check this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC) during your opponent's turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a grade 3 card from your drop other than "Heavenly Slice of Calmness, Heathcote", and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
All of this card's abilities are currently unknown.

Slogan: Fall down, as deep as you can. RevolDress!

nameEN: Sacred Crystal Dragon, Precede Arrow Dragon

flavorTextEN: The dragon demonstrates with an arrow. The path for those who are to be knights.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If a grade 3 card was revealed for your drive check this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC) during your opponent's turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a grade 3 card from your drop other than "Heavenly Judgment of Composition, Heathcourt", and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: So, you have chosen to approach me? Interesting!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit [Stand] by your card's ability, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: By sensing the pulse of life, the light will become stronger.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & reveal a normal unit from your hand, and put it on the bottom of your deck], and draw a card.

effectEN:
[CONT]:The remaining text is currently unknown.
[revolDress] The remaining text is currently unknown.
[CONT](VC):The remaining text is currently unknown.

Slogan: Fall down, as deep as you can. revolDress!

[CONT]:When this card would be rode upon, it is also regarded as "Youthberk "Skyfall Arms"".
[RevolDress]-[AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, choose up to one card with "RevolForm" in its card name from your hand, ride it as [Stand], and it gets drive -2 until end of turn.
[CONT](RC):If your grade 3 or greater vanguard was placed this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Descend, revolt, and split the skies; even if that is a path of carnage.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC) by the [RevolDress] ability, until end of turn, this unit gets [Power]+15000, and if you persona rode this turn, it gets [Critical]+1.
[AUTO](VC):At the end of your turn, choose a card with the [RevolDress] ability from your soul, and ride it as [Rest].
flavorTextEN: In order to shatter the order of the skies, the dark knight wields the strength of crimson.

effectEN:
[RevolDress]-[AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, choose up to one card with "RevolForm" in its card name from your hand, ride it as [Stand], and it gets drive -2 until end of turn.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Discard a card from your hand], look at the top three cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "RevolForm" in its card name from among them and reveal it and put it into your hand, or choose up to one grade 2 or less card from among them and call it to (RC), and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: The knight disappointed by the heavens, dons its black armor, chooses the destruction of the skies.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your other grade 3 or greater units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Now's the moment to give it your all. Show me what you've got!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Bastion" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], search your deck for up to one "Bard of the Heavenly Instrument, Lutente", call it to a (RC) in the same column as this unit, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: A world filled with heavenly light will guide us along the way.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, choose one of your other grade 3 or greater units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The glint that cleaves confusion apart should exist even within you.

nameEN: Sword Saint Knight Dragon, Gram Grace
effectEN:
[CONT](VC):Your persona ride also increases the [Power] of your back row units.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], draw a card, choose a card from your hand, and call it to a back row center (RC), and until end of turn, that unit can attack from the back row, and gets [Power] +10000.
[AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle your back row center rear-guard attacked, put that unit into soul, and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacked, if your vanguard was ridden by a card's ability this turn, your opponent cannot call normal units from hand to (GC).
flavorTextEN: A definite strike, alongside an extraordinary will to fight.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC) by the [RevolDress] ability, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [discard a card from your hand], and this unit gets [Power]+10000/drive +1 until end of turn.
[AUTO](VC):At the end of your turn, choose a card with the [RevolDress] ability from your soul, and ride it as [Rest].
flavorTextEN: The blue lightning speeds forth. Gripping the blade in these hands, leading the path forward.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have six or more grade 3 or greater units, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and until end of that battle, this unit's attack will hit regardless of [Power] while the sum of the grades of your opponent's guardians is not 3 or greater.
flavorTextEN: Those without a solid resolve are no match for me.

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row Center RC):When your vanguard with "Bastion" in its card name is attacked, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], move this unit to (GC), and this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Blessings to the brave warriors.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC) by the [RevolDress] ability, all of your front row units get [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Then, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], reveal the top two cards of your deck, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards with the same grade as any of the revealed cards, and put it on the bottom of their deck. Put all of the revealed cards into your hand.
[AUTO](VC):At the end of your turn, choose a card with the [RevolDress] ability from your soul, and ride it as [Rest].
flavorTextEN: The overflowing rain of sorrow... The emerald tempest shall blow it all away.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Bastion" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose up to one grade 3 card from your hand, and call it to (RC). If you called a card, and you have five or more units, draw a card.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have six or more units, this unit gets "Boost".
flavorTextEN: Oh knights, to the front! Now is the time to display our pride!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your other rear-guard was retired by your card's ability this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: Converting overflowing life into physical strength.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacked, if you persona rode this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000, and when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your vanguard is being attacked, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle for every two units on your (VC) and (RC).
flavorTextEN: It is my duty to spin the threads of a noble future.

Play this if you have a vanguard with "Thegrea" in its card name!

flavorTextEN: Soaring in the skies on dragons, with a shining blue sword.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacked, if you persona rode this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000, and when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):Your persona ride also increases the [Power] of your back row units.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], draw a card, choose a card from your hand, call it to your back row center (RC), and until end of turn, that unit can attack from the back row, and gets [Power]+10000.
[AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle your back row center rear-guard attacked, put that unit into your soul, and draw a card.

effectEN: [CONT](Deck/RC):If your vanguard is a [Glitter], this unit gets [Power]+5000/grade -1. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: That heart which sways between good and evil. It must be watched at all times.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, if you have a vanguard with "Minerva" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until the end of turn. Then, COST  [Put this unit into your soul], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: A regalia that masters wisdom becomes the light that brings forth omniscience.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):During your turn, if you have a grade 3 or greater "Regalia"  in its card name in your soul, all of your units in front row gets [Power]+5000.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top of your deck, and put that card on the top or soul.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack or the attack it boosted hits a vanguard, look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "Bastion" in its card name from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. If you revealed a card, and this unit is in the back row, retire this unit.

nameEN: Divine Knight of Deeply-laid Strategems, Sajess
effectEN:
[CONT](RC/GC):If your opponent's drive check or damage check revealed a trigger unit this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000/[Shield]+10000.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, look at the top card of your deck, put it on the top of the deck or into soul, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and perform all of the following.
•Choose one of your opponent's [Power] 14000 or greater vanguards, and increase this unit's [Power] by that unit's [Power] until end of that battle.
•COST  [Remove a [Over] trigger from drop], choose one of your other front row units, and it gets [Power]+15000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Don't stop thinking. Because there is a tomorrow beyond that.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if you played a normal order this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
Look at the top two cards of your deck, choose up to one grade 3 or less card from among them, call it to (RC), and put the rest on the top of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: There is hope. No matter when.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):During your turn, all of your front row units get [Power]+2000.
[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :At the end of the battle your drive check revealed a grade 3 or greater card, COST  [put a card with "Bastion" in its card name from your hand or soul into your drop], [Stand] all of your grade 3 rear-guards, and they get [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Bring out your all right here right now! Go beyond a sword that can even split the heavens!

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, draw a card! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: The waiting room for Diabolos is full of tension.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four [Heal] triggers in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn! Then, if the number of cards in your damage zone is equal to or more than your opponent's, choose a card from your damage zone, and heal it!)
flavorTextEN: This season's Gallows Bowl set new records for viewership.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: Can't we do it directly? These are just fireworks y'know?

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: We'll make the play, we're gonna score! Our dynamic will take back more~!

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: If we don't score here... you understand, right?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Never cowering in the face of enemies. That is "Diabolos".
All limbs can become weapon. In other words, an additional strike from here.

nameEN: Hades Dragon Deity of Resentment, Gallmageheld
effectEN:
(You may only have one [Over] trigger in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, remove that card, draw a card, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+100 Million until end of turn! If revealed during drive check, activate its additional effect!)
Additional Effect - You get "During your turn, all of your vanguards get [Power]+10000/[Critical]+1" until end of this fight!
flavorTextEN: Once resentment is planted, it will remain across eras as the root of evil.
All that it touches gets mangled.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN: I'm mixing up a new medicine! Its effect will also be outstanding!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Who is the one that wished to be burnt?
I'll use your share for you.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Within its small body, it holds reckless ambition unfitting for its size.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Piercing through time, the bullet to confirm destruction is fired.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Don't touch! Okay? Or you'd be eaten.

effectEN: Additional Effect - Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+100 Million until end of turn!
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Can you tell me your desires?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (GC), if your opponent's attacking unit has attacked two or more times this turn, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle. (Active if this battle is its second attack this turn or more)
flavorTextEN: Her kind light envelopes even sins that cannot be forgiven.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your opponent's attacking unit has attacked two or more times this turn, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle. (Active if this battle is its second attack this turn or more)
flavorTextEN: Her kind light envelopes even sins that cannot be forgiven.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if the attacking unit's [Critical] is 2 or greater, and its [Critical] is increased by a non-trigger effect ability or its original [Critical] is 2 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: I'll share some of my power with you. So don't die, okay?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Since birth, the dragon holds the qualifications to become strong.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: I'll make you one of my toys♪

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, draw a card! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: Research advances by devouring sacrifices.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: No need to think. Leave everything to me.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four [Heal] triggers in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn! Then, if the number of cards in your damage zone is equal to or more than your opponent's, choose a card from your damage zone, and heal it!)
flavorTextEN: An unusual guide that can help you forget everything.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)

flavorTextEN:
(D-BT06): The needles on the clock, nobody will notice if it is moved forward a little, right?
(D-SS03): Let's move forward with a step that overtakes the flow of time.

(D-BT06): The resplendent flame that bursts forth. You have also become a captive of the circus.
(D-SS03): No matter the era, the frenzy surrounding the stage will never change.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: I'll make you into my toy as well♪

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: No need to think. Leave everything to me.
